templates.name: GitHub Menu Cleanup
templates.description: Hide distracting GitHub menu items, expand sidebar repos, and clean up empty menu sections
templates.author: billiax

templates.name: GitHub Tweaks
templates.description: Auto-expand hamburger menu repos and auto-switch to dev branch on repo pages
templates.author: billiax

templates.name: Billiax Toolbar
templates.description: Fixed navigation toolbar with org links, repo shortcuts, visual modes (Compact/Focus/Hacker/Midnight), help overlay, and quick issue creator
templates.author: billiax

templates.name: Billiax Dashboard
templates.description: Repo grid with quick actions on the GitHub homepage
templates.author: billiax

templates.name: Jira UI Cleanup
templates.description: Hide promotional banners, upgrade nudges, feedback buttons, and UI clutter from Jira Cloud
templates.author: billiax

templates.name: Jira Compact Board & Focus Mode
templates.description: Compact board cards, true full-screen mode hiding sidebar and navigation, sticky column headers, and equal-width columns
templates.author: billiax

templates.name: Jira Card Color Coding
templates.description: Color-code board cards by priority (border stripe) and work type (background tint) with flagged item highlighting
templates.author: billiax

templates.name: Element Hider
templates.description: Hide any element on any website. Press Alt+H to enter hide mode, click elements to hide them.
templates.author: domo

templates.name: Keyboard Shortcuts
templates.description: Define custom keyboard shortcuts per-site. Navigate, click, scroll, toggle visibility, or run JS snippets.
templates.author: domo
